subcodes.first_line: O My Persian friends! Glad tidings of your truthfulness, fellowship and devotion to God reach Me and bring joy to all hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران پارسی من مژده راستی و دوستی و حق پرستی شما میرسد و سبب سرور قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
